mapper.sql: select c.card_id, c.iccid, c.msisdn, c.provider_account, c.card_status, c.card_status_name, c.active_time, c.package_name, c.total_flow, c.used_flow, c.left_flow, c.package_start_date, c.package_stop_date, c.period_start_date, c.period_stop_date, c.period, c.current_month, c.month_used_flow, c.expiry_level, c.flow_level, c.risk_summary, c.gateway_id, c.gateway_imei, c.fire_point_id, fp.fire_point_name, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.source_dept_id, sd.dept_name as source_dept_name, c.data_source, c.sync_status, c.sync_message, c.last_sync_time, c.raw_card_info, c.raw_package_info, c.raw_month_flow, c.remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.del_flag from fe_iot_card c left join fe_fire_point fp on c.fire_point_id = fp.fire_point_id left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_dept sd on c.source_dept_id = sd.dept_id
mapper.select: where c.del_flag = '0' and c.iccid is not null and c.iccid != '' order by c.card_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into fe_iot_card
iccid, msisdn, provider_account, card_status, card_status_name, active_time, data_source, sync_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag,
#{iccid}, #{msisdn}, #{providerAccount}, #{cardStatus}, #{cardStatusName}, #{activeTime}, #{dataSource}, #{syncStatus}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag},

insert into fe_iot_card ( iccid, provider_account, gateway_id, gateway_imei, fire_point_id, dept_id, source_dept_id, data_source, sync_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) select s.iccid, #{providerAccount}, g.gateway_id, g.imei, g.fire_point_id, g.dept_id, g.source_dept_id, #{dataSource}, #{syncStatus}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, '0' from ( select trim(sim) as iccid, min(gateway_id) as gateway_id from fe_gateway where sim is not null and trim(sim) != '' and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '0') group by trim(sim) ) s inner join fe_gateway g on g.gateway_id = s.gateway_id on duplicate key update gateway_id = ifnull(fe_iot_card.gateway_id, values(gateway_id)), gateway_imei = ifnull(fe_iot_card.gateway_imei, values(gateway_imei)), fire_point_id = ifnull(fe_iot_card.fire_point_id, values(fire_point_id)), dept_id = ifnull(fe_iot_card.dept_id, values(dept_id)), source_dept_id = ifnull(fe_iot_card.source_dept_id, values(source_dept_id)), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)

insert into fe_iot_card_month_flow ( card_id, iccid, flow_month, month_used_flow, raw_response, sync_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{cardId}, #{iccid}, #{flowMonth}, #{monthUsedFlow}, #{rawResponse}, #{syncTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} ) on duplicate key update card_id = values(card_id), month_used_flow = values(month_used_flow), raw_response = values(raw_response), sync_time = values(sync_time), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
